name: gift-christmas-2026
voiceover: This Christmas, give them something they'll remember. A story made just for them. Their name woven through. Made by hand. Just twenty four ninety nine. heartheirname dot com.

scenes.image_prompt: Editorial photograph of a grandparent (around 65) and a 6-year-old grandchild sitting close together on a sofa in late afternoon light, the grandchild leaning into the grandparent's shoulder with a dreamy expression. Phone propped on a wooden side table between them. Warm cream walls, soft cushions. Shot on medium format, Portra 400, natural window light, slight grain. No brand logos, no screens visible. Vertical 9:16.
scenes.caption: This Christmas...

scenes.image_prompt: Close editorial photograph of a 6-year-old grandchild's face, eyes closed, listening intently with a small smile, late afternoon golden light catching their hair, head tilted slightly toward an unseen speaker. Soft focus background of a living room. Shot on medium format, Portra 400, slight grain, warm tones. Vertical 9:16.
scenes.caption: ...give them something they'll remember.

scenes.image_prompt: Editorial photograph of an open hardback children's book on a wooden coffee table, a mug of tea beside it, soft afternoon light, two pairs of hands (one elderly, one a child's) reaching toward the page. Shot on medium format, Portra 400, slight grain, warm tones. Vertical 9:16.
scenes.caption: Made by hand.
